creator: devosalain@ymail.com
text:
Indeed i had by accident put an ARM FLAG :
i.e. "mno-unaligned-access" is not for amd64 so it's normal compilation sometimes fails.

Building functions succesfully with following flags.

MYFLAGS=" -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -fno-short-enums -fexceptions -fident -fverbose-asm -frecord-gcc-switches -fvisibility=default -fomit-frame-pointer -fstrict-aliasing -mstackrealign -Wformat -Wformat-security "



This was a user error and can be closed.
